title: GST/HST credit: calculation sheets - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST credit: calculation sheets
- Calculation sheet for the July 2025 to June 2026 payments (2024 base year)
- Calculation sheet for the July 2024 to June 2025 payments (2023 base year)
- Calculation sheet for the July 2023 to June 2024 payments (2022 base year)
- Calculation sheet for the Grocery Rebate ( July 5, 2023 )
- Calculation sheet for the additional one-time GST credit payment ( November 4, 2022 )
- calculation sheet for the July 2022 to June 2023 payments (2021 base year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
